8 7 6
Disciple : Oh! Master how to confirm that the native is an
Anaethesist.
Master: This is a female chart. Saturn indicating work is
with the exalted planet of Venus and also with Dragon-Head.
Mars is 5th from Pisces and Saturn is aspected directly by Jupiter.

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 77
Therefore SATURN+VENUS+DRAGON HEAD+
MOON+ASPECT OF JUPITER FROM THE the 7th. Saturn
(Work) Venus (The secret Knowledge ofSanjivini) and Dragon-
Head is Maya and Moon (Mana-the Mind).
S=KARMA
V=Secret knowledge of Medicine
M=Mind
DH=lllusion (Maya).
Therefore. Work is connected with Gupta (Secret)-
Maya-Mohaka-and!Since there is Jupiter aspect. It indicates that
the native is a doctor in such line.
